mapper.select:
SELECT s.uid AS sellerUid, s.companyName AS companyName, s.bizRegNo AS bizRegNo, COUNT(DISTINCT o.orderNo) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN o.orderNo END) AS paidCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'SHIPPING' THEN o.orderNo END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN o.orderNo END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN o.orderNo END) AS confirmedCount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.total), 0) AS orderTotal, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN oi.total ELSE 0 END), 0) AS salesTotal FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = oi.orderNo JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = pv.prodNo JOIN seller s ON s.uid = p.sellerUid
GROUP BY s.uid, s.companyName, s.bizRegNo ORDER BY orderTotal DESC, s.uid ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT s.uid FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = oi.orderNo JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = pv.prodNo JOIN seller s ON s.uid = p.sellerUid
GROUP BY s.uid ) t
